debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
c : α
⊢ slice_over c = @CategoryInContext.Category.slice_over' α C c

failed_attempts:
simp_all [slice_over, slice_over']
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Category.opp, Opposite]) <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try rfl)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      congr 1
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Category.opp, Opposite]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try rfl)
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      congr 1 <;>
      (try simp_all [Category.opp, Opposite]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try rfl)
    })

slice_over c = @CategoryInContext.Category.slice_over' α C c := by
    rfl
  exact h

simp [slice_over, slice_over', C.opp]
  <;> rfl
  <;> simp_all [C.opp]
  <;> rfl

rfl
  have h₂ : (@CategoryInContext.Category.slice_over' α C c : Type u_1) := @slice_under (Opposite α) (C.opp) c := by rfl
  have h₃ : slice_under c ≃ (@slice_under (Opposite α) (C.opp) c : Type u_1) := by
    apply Type_equiv.ofEquiv
    apply @Equiv.ofBijective
    -- Define the equivalence
    have fun1 := fun (F : @slice_under (Opposite α) (C.opp) c) => ⟨⟨F.right, F.left⟩, by
      simp_all [Category.opp, Category.Hom, Subtype.val_mk]⟩
    have fun2 := fun (F : slice_under c) => ⟨⟨F.right, F.left⟩, by
      simp_all [Category.opp, Category.Hom, Subtype.val_mk]⟩
    -- Prove that it is bijective
    <;> simp_all [Equiv.bijective]
    <;> aesop
  -- Use the equivalence to conclude the equality
  have h₄ : slice_over c = @CategoryInContext.Category.slice_over' α C c := by
    congr
  exact h₄
